title: Westward Bound
writer: Elizabeth Beecher, Frances Kavanaugh, Robert Emmett Tansey
actors: Ken Maynard, Hoot Gibson, Bob Steele
plot: Learning that Montana is about to become a state and that property values will rise rapidly, Caldwell is using his outlaw gang to force the ranchers off their land. To fight back Tuttle sends for the Trail Blazers and unaware of M...
